creator: thomasdziedzic0@gmail.com
text:
I checked out https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.2R/announce/ and it mentions that there should be 14.2 images for vagrant available.

I got a 404 when trying to use the commands in the announcement.

I also confirmed that they don't exist here: https://portal.cloud.hashicorp.com/vagrant/discover/freebsd
